en: Yes. He's coming down tomorrow on the first leg of his trip to Tangiers.
ko: Yes. He's coming down tomorrow on the first leg of his trip to Tangiers.

en: I've asked him here. Good. How is he?
ko: I've asked him here. Good. How is he?

en: Sad. He loved his cousin, and it was all so quick.
ko: Sad. He loved his cousin, and it was all so quick.

en: The trouble is, they've already buried him, and Bertie's not quite sure what to do.
ko: The trouble is, they've already buried him, and Bertie's not quite sure what to do.
ja: 問題は、もう埋葬してしまったことで、バーティはどうすべきかよくわかっていません。
zhTW: 問題是，他們已經把他埋了，而Bertie不太確定該怎麼辦。
vi: Vấn đề là, họ đã chôn anh ấy rồi, và Bertie không biết phải làm gì.

en: Well, that's ordinary in hot countries. It won't mean any disrespect.
ko: Well, that's ordinary in hot countries. It won't mean any disrespect.
ja: 暑い国では普通のことです。失礼には当たりません。
zhTW: 在炎熱的國家這很正常。這並不代表不敬。
vi: Ở những nước nóng thì chuyện đó bình thường. Không có gì là bất kính cả.

en: No. But should they leave him there?
ko: No. But should they leave him there?

en: Surely the decision is down to the new Marquis, not to Bertie.
ko: Surely the decision is down to the new Marquis, not to Bertie.

en: Well, that's the thing. He is the new Marquis. Bertie?
ko: Well, that's the thing. He is the new Marquis. Bertie?

en: Bertie Pelham is now the Marquis of Hexham? Yes.
ko: Bertie Pelham is now the Marquis of Hexham? Yes.

en: Nonsense. He's having you on. He'd have told you if he was the heir.
ko: Nonsense. He's having you on. He'd have told you if he was the heir.

en: He did tell me. But his cousin was in his 30s, and they all knew the girl he was going to marry.
ko: He did tell me. But his cousin was in his 30s, and they all knew the girl he was going to marry.

en: But that's absurd. If Bertie's a Marquis, then Edith...
ko: But that's absurd. If Bertie's a Marquis, then Edith...

en: Edith would outrank us all. Yes, that's right.
ko: Edith would outrank us all. Yes, that's right.

ja: 近い親族だったのですか？
vi: Anh ấy là họ hàng gần không?

en: Second cousin once removed. Nobody thought it was possible he would ever inherit.
ko: Second cousin once removed. Nobody thought it was possible he would ever inherit.
